languages.text: "Великолепно, Лорд-капитан!" {n}Мужчина поднимает взгляд, и вам становится заметен позолоченный ушной имплант, заменивший {d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_VivisectorWounded}отстреленное ухо{/d}.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Великолепно, Лорд-капитан!" {n}Мужчина поднимает взгляд и вам становится заметен позолоченный ушной имплант, заменивший отстреленное ухо. На каждом сказанном слове медикарий слегка морщит прилежащую к импланту половину лица.{/n}

languages.text: "Excellent, Lord Captain!" {n}The man looks up, and you see the gold-plated implant replacing the {d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_VivisectorWounded}ear that was shot off{/d}.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Великолепно, Лорд-капитан!" {n}Мужчина поднимает взгляд, и вам становится заметен позолоченный ушной имплант, заменивший {d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_VivisectorWounded}отстреленное ухо{/d}.{/n}

"Excellent, Lord Captain!" {n}The man looks up, and you see the gold-plated implant replacing the ear that was shot off.{/n}
"Excellent, Lord Captain!" {n}The man looks up, and you see the gold-plated implant replacing the ear that was shot off.{/n}

languages.text: 「素晴らしい、艦長様！」{n}その男は顔を上げ、撃たれた耳の代わりに金メッキの義耳が埋め込まれているのが見える。{/n}
languages.original_text: "Excellent, Lord Captain!" {n}The man looks up, and you see the gold-plated implant replacing the ear that was shot off.{/n}

languages.text: "Harika Lord Kaptan!" {n}Adam, başını kaldırıyor. {d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_VivisectorWounded}Vurularak kopan kulağının{/d} yerini alan altın kaplama implantı görüyorsun.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Excellent, Lord Captain!" {n}The man looks up, and you see the gold-plated implant replacing the {d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_VivisectorWounded}ear that was shot off{/d}.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Harika Lord Kaptan!" {n}Adam, başını kaldırıyor. {d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_VivisectorWounded}Vurularak kopan kulağının{/d} yerini alan altın kaplama implantı görüyorsun.{/n}

languages.text: “一切顺利，舰长大人！”{n}男子抬头时，你发现他{d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_VivisectorWounded}伤缺的耳朵{/d}处装上了镀金植入物。{/n}
languages.original_text: "Excellent, Lord Captain!" {n}The man looks up, and you see the gold-plated implant replacing the {d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_VivisectorWounded}ear that was shot off{/d}.{/n}

traits.locale_text: “一切顺利，舰长大人！”{n}男子抬头时，你发现他{d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_VivisectorWounded}伤缺的耳朵{/d}处装上了镀金植入物。{/n}

languages.text: "Ausgezeichnet, Lord Captain!" {n}Der Mann hebt den Kopf und du siehst das vergoldete Implantat, das sein {d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_VivisectorWounded}weggeschossenes Ohr{/d} ersetzt.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Excellent, Lord Captain!" {n}The man looks up, and you see the gold-plated implant replacing the {d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_VivisectorWounded}ear that was shot off{/d}.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Ausgezeichnet, Lord Captain!" {n}Der Mann hebt den Kopf und du siehst das vergoldete Implantat, das sein {d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_VivisectorWounded}weggeschossenes Ohr{/d} ersetzt.{/n}

languages.text: « Excellente, {mf|seigneur-capitaine|seigneure-capitaine} ! » {n}L'homme redresse la tête, et vous apercevez l'implant plaqué or qui remplace son {d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_VivisectorWounded}oreille arrachée par le coup de feu{/d}.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Excellent, Lord Captain!" {n}The man looks up, and you see the gold-plated implant replacing the {d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_VivisectorWounded}ear that was shot off{/d}.{/n}

traits.locale_text: « Excellente, {mf|seigneur-capitaine|seigneure-capitaine} ! » {n}L'homme redresse la tête, et vous apercevez l'implant plaqué or qui remplace son {d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_VivisectorWounded}oreille arrachée par le coup de feu{/d}.{/n}

languages.text: «¡Estupendamente, Lord Capitán!». {n}El hombre levanta la mirada y ves el implante chapado en oro que sustituye la {d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_VivisectorWounded}oreja que perdió{/d}.{/n}
